fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis of a variable font.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationAxis` describes a single axis of a variable font, including its
four-byte tag, minimum, default, and maximum values, and whether the axis is
hidden from user interfaces.

Retrieve the axes of a typeface using <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignParameters>
or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GetVariationDesignParameters(System.Span{SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis})>.

This is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
using var typeface = SKTypeface.FromFile("variable.ttf");
var axes = typeface.VariationDesignParameters;
foreach (var axis in axes)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"{axis.Tag}: min={axis.Min}, default={axis.Default}, max={axis.Max}");
}
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the default value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The default value of the axis.
